tracks.title: 🏇 Golden Tempo — Kentucky Derby 2026 Epic Tribute | Last to First 23-1 | Assirem Music PROD
tracks.description:
An epic cinematic tribute to the most dramatic Kentucky Derby in history.

Golden Tempo, a 23-1 long shot, rallied from LAST place (18th) to FIRST to win the 152nd Run for the Roses — ridden by Jose Ortiz, trained by Cherie DeVaux, the first woman ever to train a Kentucky Derby winner.

Brother vs brother at the finish: Jose Ortiz (Golden Tempo) vs Irad Ortiz Jr. (Renegade).

"I'm glad that I could be a representative of all women everywhere that we can do anything we set our minds to." — Cherie DeVaux

tracks.title: 🇵🇪 Condor of the Andes | Cóndor de los Andes — Andean Music Peru | Assirem Music PROD
tracks.description:
Un homenaje a la música ancestral de los Andes peruanos — charango, quena y zampoña.

A tribute to the ancestral music of the Peruvian Andes — featuring traditional instruments that have echoed through these mountains for over 5,000 years.

La quena, una de las flautas más antiguas de los Andes, es considerada la voz sagrada de la Pachamama. El charango, instrumento nacional del Perú, nació durante el Virreinato como adaptación de la vihuela española.

La danza de tijeras de Ayacucho es Patrimonio Cultural Inmaterial de la UNESCO.

⏱️ Chapters:
00:00 — Amanecer en Cusco
01:00 — Quena Solo
02:15 — Charango y Cajón
03:30 — Zampoña Bridge
04:20 — Vuelo del Cóndor

🎧 Best for: meditation, travel, cultural discovery, world music lovers
